title: decide-resubmit output
description:
Decision record from decide-resubmit.

action == 'complete' (nothing failed) / 'resubmit' (failed_fraction <= threshold, auto) / 'escalate' (failed_fraction > threshold; caller decides, safe_default 'investigate').

failed_fraction.description: failed_count / total_tasks, rounded to 4 places — the evidence the threshold decision turns on.
failed_fraction.title: Failed Fraction

threshold.description: The resubmit_failed_threshold the decision was taken against.
threshold.title: Threshold

safe_default.description: 'investigate' on escalate (don't auto-resubmit at a high failure rate); null on complete/resubmit (no judgement needed).
safe_default.title: Safe Default

rationale.description: Human-readable explanation of the chosen action.
rationale.title: Rationale
